v.CNV: 门徒不断增加的时候，讲希腊话的犹太人，埋怨本地的希伯来人，因为在日常的供给上，忽略了他们的寡妇。
v.ESV: Now in these days when the disciples were increasing in number, a complaint by the Hellenists arose against the Hebrews because their widows were being neglected in the daily distribution.
v.GAE: 그 때에 제자가 더 많아졌는데 헬라파 유대인들이 자기의 과부들이 매일의 구제에 빠지므로 히브리파 사람을 원망하니
v.KJV: And in those days, when the number of the disciples was multiplied, there arose a murmuring of the Grecians against the Hebrews, because their widows were neglected in the daily ministration.
v.NASB: Now at this time while the disciples were increasing in number, a complaint arose on the part of the Hellenistic Jews against the native Hebrews, because their widows were being overlooked in the daily serving of food.
v.NIV: In those days when the number of disciples was increasing, the Hellenistic Jews among them complained against the Hebraic Jews because their widows were being overlooked in the daily distribution of food.
v.NRSV: Now during those days, when the disciples were increasing in number, the Hellenists complained against the Hebrews because their widows were being neglected in the daily distribution of food.
v.SAENEW: 이 시기에 제자들이 점점 불어났다. 그런데 그리스 말을 하는 유대 사람들이 히브리 말을 하는 유대 사람들에게 불평을 터뜨렸다. 그것은 자기네 과부들이 날마다 구호 음식을 나누어 받는 일에 소홀히 여김을 받기 때문이었다.
v.WLB: 이 무렵 제자들의 수는 점점 늘어났습니다. 그때 그들 가운데 그리스파 유대 사람들이 히브리파 유대 사람들에 대해 불평이 생겼습니다. 매일 음식을 분배받는 일에서 그리스파 유대 사람 과부들이 빠졌기 때문입니다.

v.CNV: 于是十二使徒召集了众门徒，说：“要我们放下　神的道，去管理伙食，是不合适的。
v.ESV: And the twelve summoned the full number of the disciples and said, “It is not right that we should give up preaching the word of God to serve tables.
v.GAE: 열두 사도가 모든 제자를 불러 이르되 우리가 하나님의 말씀을 제쳐 놓고 접대를 일삼는 것이 마땅하지 아니하니
v.KJV: Then the twelve called the multitude of the disciples unto them, and said, It is not reason that we should leave the word of God, and serve tables.
v.NASB: So the twelve summoned the congregation of the disciples and said, 'It is not desirable for us to neglect the word of God in order to serve tables.
v.NIV: So the Twelve gathered all the disciples together and said, “It would not be right for us to neglect the ministry of the word of God in order to wait on tables.
v.NRSV: And the twelve called together the whole community of the disciples and said, “It is not right that we should neglect the word of God in order to wait on tables.
v.SAENEW: 그래서 열두 사도가 제자들을 모두 불러놓고 말하였다. "우리가 하나님의 말씀을 전하는 일은 제쳐놓고서 음식 베푸는 일에 힘쓰는 것은 좋지 못합니다.
v.WLB: 그리하여 열두 사도들은 제자들을 모두 불러 놓고 말했습니다. “우리가 음식을 분배하는 일로 인해 하나님의 말씀 가르치는 사역을 소홀히 여기는 것은 옳지 않습니다.

v.CNV: 所以弟兄们，应当从你们中间选出七个有好见证、满有圣灵和智慧的人，我们就派他们负责这事。
v.ESV: Therefore, brothers, pick out from among you seven men of good repute, full of the Spirit and of wisdom, whom we will appoint to this duty.
v.GAE: 형제들아 너희 가운데서 성령과 지혜가 충만하여 칭찬 받는 사람 일곱을 택하라 우리가 이 일을 그들에게 맡기고
v.KJV: Wherefore, brethren, look ye out among you seven men of honest report, full of the Holy Ghost and wisdom, whom we may appoint over this business.
v.NASB: 'Therefore, brethren, select from among you seven men of good reputation, full of the Spirit and of wisdom, whom we may put in charge of this task.
v.NIV: Brothers and sisters, choose seven men from among you who are known to be full of the Spirit and wisdom. We will turn this responsibility over to them
v.NRSV: Therefore, friends, select from among yourselves seven men of good standing, full of the Spirit and of wisdom, whom we may appoint to this task,
v.SAENEW: 그러니 형제자매 여러분, 신망이 있고 성령과 지혜가 충만한 사람 일곱을 여러분 가운데서 뽑으십시오. 그러면 그들에게 이 일을 맡기고,
v.WLB: 형제들이여, 여러분 가운데 성령과 지혜가 충만하다고 알려진 사람 일곱 명을 뽑으십시오. 그러면 이 임무는 그들에게 맡기고

v.CNV: 至于我们，我们要专心祈祷、传道。”
v.ESV: But we will devote ourselves to prayer and to the ministry of the word.”
v.GAE: 우리는 오로지 기도하는 일과 말씀 사역에 힘쓰리라 하니
v.KJV: But we will give ourselves continually to prayer, and to the ministry of the word.
v.NASB: 'But we will devote ourselves to prayer and to the ministry of the word.'
v.NIV: and will give our attention to prayer and the ministry of the word.”
v.NRSV: while we, for our part, will devote ourselves to prayer and to serving the word.”
v.SAENEW: 우리는 기도하는 일과 말씀을 섬기는 일에 헌신하겠습니다."
v.WLB: 우리는 기도하고 말씀을 가르치는 일에 온 힘을 기울이겠습니다.”

v.CNV: 这个意见全会众都很满意，于是选出司提反，他是一位满有信心和圣灵的人，还有腓利、伯罗哥罗、尼加挪、提门、巴米拿，以及归信犹太教的安提阿人尼哥拉，
v.ESV: And what they said pleased the whole gathering, and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit, and Philip, and Prochorus, and Nicanor, and Timon, and Parmenas, and Nicolaus, a proselyte of Antioch.
v.GAE: 온 무리가 이 말을 기뻐하여 믿음과 성령이 충만한 사람 스데반과 또 빌립과 브로고로와 니가노르와 디몬과 바메나와 유대교에 입교했던 안디옥 사람 니골라를 택하여
v.KJV: And the saying pleased the whole multitude: and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Ghost, and Philip, and Prochorus, and Nicanor, and Timon, and Parmenas, and Nicolas a proselyte of Antioch:
v.NASB: The statement found approval with the whole congregation; and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit, and Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas and Nicolas, a proselyte from Antioch.
v.NIV: This proposal pleased the whole group. They chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit; also Philip, Procorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, and Nicolas from Antioch, a convert to Judaism.
v.NRSV: What they said pleased the whole community, and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and the Holy Spirit, together with Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, and Nicolaus, a proselyte of Antioch.
v.SAENEW: 모든 사람이 이 말을 좋게 받아들여서, 믿음과 성령이 충만한 사람인 스데반과 빌립과 브로고로와 니가노르와 디몬과 바메나와 안디옥 출신의 이방 사람으로서 유대교에 개종한 사람인 니골라를 뽑아서,
v.WLB: 모든 사람들이 이 제안을 기쁘게 받아들였습니다. 그들은 믿음과 성령이 충만한 사람 스데반과 빌립, 브로고로, 니가노르, 디몬, 바메나, 유대교로 개종한 안디옥 사람 니골라를 뽑았습니다.

v.CNV: 叫他们站在使徒面前。使徒祷告后，就为他们按手。
v.ESV: These they set before the apostles, and they prayed and laid their hands on them.
v.GAE: 사도들 앞에 세우니 사도들이 기도하고 그들에게 안수하니라
v.KJV: Whom they set before the apostles: and when they had prayed, they laid their hands on them.
v.NASB: And these they brought before the apostles; and after praying, they laid their hands on them.
v.NIV: They presented these men to the apostles, who prayed and laid their hands on them.
v.NRSV: They had these men stand before the apostles, who prayed and laid their hands on them.
v.SAENEW: 사도들 앞에 세웠다. 사도들은 기도하고, 그들에게 안수하였다.
v.WLB: 그들은 이 사람들을 사도들 앞에 세웠고 사도들은 그 사람들 머리 위에 손을 얹고 기도했습니다.

v.CNV: 神的道传开了；在耶路撒冷，门徒人数大大增加，有很多祭司也信从了真道。
v.ESV: And the word of God continued to increase, and the number of the disciples multiplied greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests became obedient to the faith.
v.GAE: 하나님의 말씀이 점점 왕성하여 예루살렘에 있는 제자의 수가 더 심히 많아지고 허다한 제사장의 무리도 이 도에 복종하니라
v.KJV: And the word of God increased; and the number of the disciples multiplied in Jerusalem greatly; and a great company of the priests were obedient to the faith.
v.NASB: The word of God kept on spreading; and the number of the disciples continued to increase greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests were becoming obedient to the faith.
v.NIV: So the word of God spread. The number of disciples in Jerusalem increased rapidly, and a large number of priests became obedient to the faith.
v.NRSV: The word of God continued to spread; the number of the disciples increased greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests became obedient to the faith.
v.SAENEW: 하나님의 말씀이 계속 퍼져 나가서 예루살렘에 있는 제자들의 수가 부쩍 늘어가고, 제사장들 가운데서도 이 믿음에 순종하는 사람들이 많았다.
v.WLB: 이렇게 해서 하나님의 말씀은 계속 널리 퍼져 나갔으며 이로써 예루살렘에 있는 제자들의 수도 많이 늘었고 더욱이 수많은 제사장들도 이 믿음에 순종하게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 司提反满有恩惠能力，在民间施行大奇事和神迹。
v.ESV: And Stephen, full of grace and power, was doing great wonders and signs among the people.
v.GAE: 스데반이 은혜와 권능이 충만하여 큰 기사와 표적을 민간에 행하니
v.KJV: And Stephen, full of faith and power, did great wonders and miracles among the people.
v.NASB: And Stephen, full of grace and power, was performing great wonders and signs among the people.
v.NIV: Now Stephen, a man full of God’s grace and power, performed great wonders and signs among the people.
v.NRSV: Stephen, full of grace and power, did great wonders and signs among the people.
v.SAENEW: 스데반은 은혜와 능력이 충만해서, 백성 가운데서 놀라운 일과 큰 기적을 행하고 있었다.
v.WLB: 스데반은 하나님의 은혜와 능력이 충만해 사람들 가운데 큰 기사와 표적을 행했습니다.

v.CNV: 当时有几个称为“自由人”会堂的人，就是从古利奈和亚历山太来的人，另外还有基利家人和亚西亚人，他们出面与司提反辩论，
v.ESV: Then some of those who belonged to the synagogue of the Freedmen (as it was called), and of the Cyrenians, and of the Alexandrians, and of those from Cilicia and Asia, rose up and disputed with Stephen.
v.GAE: 이른 바 자유민들 즉 구레네인, 알렉산드리아인, 길리기아와 아시아에서 온 사람들의 회당에서 어떤 자들이 일어나 스데반과 더불어 논쟁할새
v.KJV: Then there arose certain of the synagogue, which is called the synagogue of the Libertines, and Cyrenians, and Alexandrians, and of them of Cilicia and of Asia, disputing with Stephen.
v.NASB: But some men from what was called the Synagogue of the Freedmen, including both Cyrenians and Alexandrians, and some from Cilicia and Asia, rose up and argued with Stephen.
v.NIV: Opposition arose, however, from members of the Synagogue of the Freedmen (as it was called)—Jews of Cyrene and Alexandria as well as the provinces of Cilicia and Asia —who began to argue with Stephen.
v.NRSV: Then some of those who belonged to the synagogue of the Freedmen (as it was called), Cyrenians, Alexandrians, and others of those from Cilicia and Asia, stood up and argued with Stephen.
v.SAENEW: 그 때에 구레네 사람과 알렉산드리아 사람과 길리기아와 아시아에서 온 사람으로 구성된, 이른바 리버디노 회당에 소속된 사람들 가운데에서 몇이 들고일어나서, 스데반과 논쟁을 벌였다.
v.WLB: 그런데 그때 구레네, 알렉산드리아, 길리기아와 아시아 등지에서 온 유대 사람들로 구성된 이른바 ‘자유인의 회당’에 속한 사람들 가운데 스데반을 반대하는 사람들이 일어났습니다. 그들은 스데반과 논쟁을 벌이기 시작했지만

v.CNV: 但司提反靠着圣灵和智慧说话，他们就抵挡不住。
v.ESV: But they could not withstand the wisdom and the Spirit with which he was speaking.
v.GAE: 스데반이 지혜와 성령으로 말함을 그들이 능히 당하지 못하여
v.KJV: And they were not able to resist the wisdom and the spirit by which he spake.
v.NASB: But they were unable to cope with the wisdom and the Spirit with which he was speaking.
v.NIV: But they could not stand up against the wisdom the Spirit gave him as he spoke.
v.NRSV: But they could not withstand the wisdom and the Spirit with which he spoke.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 스데반이 지혜와 성령으로 말하므로, 그들은 스데반을 당해 낼 수 없었다.
v.WLB: 스데반이 지혜와 성령으로 말하는 것을 모두 당해 낼 수 없었습니다.

v.CNV: 于是他们唆使众人，说：“我们听过他说谤渎摩西和　神的话。”
v.ESV: Then they secretly instigated men who said, “We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God.”
v.GAE: 사람들을 매수하여 말하게 하되 이 사람이 모세와 하나님을 모독하는 말을 하는 것을 우리가 들었노라 하게 하고
v.KJV: Then they suborned men, which said, We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses, and against God.
v.NASB: Then they secretly induced men to say, 'We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and against God.'
v.NIV: Then they secretly persuaded some men to say, “We have heard Stephen speak blasphemous words against Moses and against God.”
v.NRSV: Then they secretly instigated some men to say, “We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God.”
v.SAENEW: 그러므로 그들은 사람들을 선동하여 "스데반이 모세와 하나님을 모독하는 말을 하는 것을 우리가 들었습니다" 하고 말하게 하였다.
v.WLB: 그러자 그들은 돈을 주고 몇몇 사람을 시켜 “스데반이 모세와 하나님을 모독하는 것을 들었다”라고 말하게 했습니다.

v.CNV: 又煽动民众、长老、经学家，这些人就来捉拿他，把他带到公议会，
v.ESV: And they stirred up the people and the elders and the scribes, and they came upon him and seized him and brought him before the council,
v.GAE: 백성과 장로와 서기관들을 충동시켜 와서 잡아가지고 공회에 이르러
v.KJV: And they stirred up the people, and the elders, and the scribes, and came upon him, and caught him, and brought him to the council,
v.NASB: And they stirred up the people, the elders and the scribes, and they came up to him and dragged him away and brought him before the Council.
v.NIV: So they stirred up the people and the elders and the teachers of the law. They seized Stephen and brought him before the Sanhedrin.
v.NRSV: They stirred up the people as well as the elders and the scribes; then they suddenly confronted him, seized him, and brought him before the council.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 백성과 장로들과 율법학자들을 부추기고, 스데반에게로 몰려가 그를 붙잡아서, 공의회로 끌고 왔다.
v.WLB: 그들은 이렇게 백성들과 장로들과 율법학자들을 선동해 스데반을 붙잡아 공회 앞으로 끌고 갔습니다.

v.CNV: 并且造了假的证供说：“这人不断抨击圣地和律法。
v.ESV: and they set up false witnesses who said, “This man never ceases to speak words against this holy place and the law,
v.GAE: 거짓 증인들을 세우니 이르되 이 사람이 이 거룩한 곳과 율법을 거슬러 말하기를 마지 아니하는도다
v.KJV: And set up false witnesses, which said, This man ceaseth not to speak blasphemous words against this holy place, and the law:
v.NASB: They put forward false witnesses who said, 'This man incessantly speaks against this holy place and the Law;
v.NIV: They produced false witnesses, who testified, “This fellow never stops speaking against this holy place and against the law.
v.NRSV: They set up false witnesses who said, “This man never stops saying things against this holy place and the law;
v.SAENEW: 그리고 거짓 증인들을 세워서, 이렇게 말하게 하였다. "이 사람은 쉴새 없이 [이] 거룩한 곳과 율법을 거슬러 말을 합니다.
v.WLB: 그들은 가짜 증인들을 내세워 거짓 증언을 하게 했습니다. “이 사람은 이 거룩한 곳과 율법에 대해 험담을 그치지 않고 계속해 왔습니다.

v.CNV: 我们听他说过：‘这拿撒勒人耶稣要毁坏这地方，改变摩西传给我们的规例。’”
v.ESV: for we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place and will change the customs that Moses delivered to us.”
v.GAE: 그의 말에 이 나사렛 예수가 이 곳을 헐고 또 모세가 우리에게 전하여 준 규례를 고치겠다 함을 우리가 들었노라 하거늘
v.KJV: For we have heard him say, that this Jesus of Nazareth shall destroy this place, and shall change the customs which Moses delivered us.
v.NASB: for we have heard him say that this Nazarene, Jesus, will destroy this place and alter the customs which Moses handed down to us.'
v.NIV: For we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place and change the customs Moses handed down to us.”
v.NRSV: for we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place and will change the customs that Moses handed on to us.”
v.SAENEW: 이 사람이, 나사렛 예수가 이 곳을 헐고 또 모세가 우리에게 전하여 준 규례를 뜯어 고칠 것이라고 말하는 것을, 우리가 들었습니다."
v.WLB: 우리는 이 사람이 나사렛 예수가 이곳을 무너뜨리고 모세가 우리에게 전해 준 관습들을 바꿀 것이라고 말하는 것을 들었습니다.”

v.CNV: 当时，坐在公议会里的人，都注视他，见他的面貌像天使一样。
v.ESV: And gazing at him, all who sat in the council saw that his face was like the face of an angel.
v.GAE: 공회 중에 앉은 사람들이 다 스데반을 주목하여 보니 그 얼굴이 천사의 얼굴과 같더라
v.KJV: And all that sat in the council, looking stedfastly on him, saw his face as it had been the face of an angel.
v.NASB: And fixing their gaze on him, all who were sitting in the Council saw his face like the face of an angel.
v.NIV: All who were sitting in the Sanhedrin looked intently at Stephen, and they saw that his face was like the face of an angel.
v.NRSV: And all who sat in the council looked intently at him, and they saw that his face was like the face of an angel.
v.SAENEW: 공의회에 앉아 있는 사람들이 모두 스데반을 주목하여 보니, 그 얼굴이 천사의 얼굴 같았다.
v.WLB: 그러자 공회에 앉아 있던 사람들이 모두 스데반을 주목했습니다. 그때 그의 얼굴은 마치 천사의 얼굴처럼 보였습니다.
